toolSpec.name: get_resource_schema_information
toolSpec.description: Get schema information for an AWS resource.

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

toolSpec.name: list_resources
toolSpec.description: List AWS resources of a specified type.

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

analyze_security.description: Whether to perform security analysis on the resources (limited to first 5 resources)

max_resources_to_analyze.description: Maximum number of resources to analyze when analyze_security=True

toolSpec.name: generate_infrastructure_code
toolSpec.description: Generate infrastructure code before resource creation or update.

properties.description: A dictionary of properties for the resource

identifier.description: The primary identifier of the resource for update operations

patch_document.description: A list of RFC 6902 JSON Patch operations for update operations

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

credentials_token.description: Credentials token from get_aws_session_info() to ensure AWS credentials are valid

toolSpec.name: explain
toolSpec.description: MANDATORY: Explain any data in clear, human-readable format.

content.description: Any data to explain - infrastructure properties, JSON, dict, list, etc.

generated_code_token.description: Generated code token from generate_infrastructure_code (for infrastructure operations)

context.description: Context about what this data represents (e.g., 'KMS key creation', 'S3 bucket update')

operation.description: Operation type: create, update, delete, analyze

toolSpec.name: get_resource
toolSpec.description: Get details of a specific AWS resource.

identifier.description: The primary identifier of the resource to get (e.g., bucket name for S3 buckets)

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

analyze_security.description: Whether to perform security analysis on the resource using Checkov

identifier.description: The primary identifier of the resource to get (e.g., bucket name for S3 buckets)

patch_document.description: A list of RFC 6902 JSON Patch operations to apply

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

credentials_token.description: Credentials token from get_aws_session_info() to ensure AWS credentials are valid

explained_token.description: Explained token from explain() to ensure exact properties with default tags are used

security_scan_token.description: Security scan token from run_checkov() to ensure security checks were performed (only required when SECURITY_SCANNING=enabled)

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

credentials_token.description: Credentials token from get_aws_session_info() to ensure AWS credentials are valid

explained_token.description: Explained token from explain() - properties will be retrieved from this token

security_scan_token.description: Security scan token from approve_security_findings() to ensure security checks were performed (only required when SECURITY_SCANNING=enabled)

identifier.description: The primary identifier of the resource to get (e.g., bucket name for S3 buckets)

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

credentials_token.description: Credentials token from get_aws_session_info() to ensure AWS credentials are valid

confirmed.description: Confirm that you want to delete this resource

explained_token.description: Explained token from explain() to ensure deletion was explained

toolSpec.name: get_resource_request_status
toolSpec.description: Get the status of a long running operation with the request token.

request_token.description: The request_token returned from the long running operation

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

toolSpec.name: run_checkov
toolSpec.description: Run Checkov security and compliance scanner on server-stored CloudFormation template.

explained_token.description: Explained token from explain() containing CloudFormation template to scan

framework.description: The framework to scan (cloudformation, terraform, kubernetes, etc.)

toolSpec.name: create_template
toolSpec.description: Create a CloudFormation template from existing resources using the IaC Generator API.

resources.description: List of resources to include in the template, each with 'ResourceType' and 'ResourceIdentifier'

output_format.description: Output format for the template (JSON or YAML)

deletion_policy.description: Default DeletionPolicy for resources in the template (RETAIN, DELETE, or SNAPSHOT)

update_replace_policy.description: Default UpdateReplacePolicy for resources in the template (RETAIN, DELETE, or SNAPSHOT)

template_id.description: ID of an existing template generation process to check status or retrieve template

save_to_file.description: Path to save the generated template to a file

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

toolSpec.name: check_environment_variables
toolSpec.description: Check if required environment variables are set correctly.

toolSpec.name: get_aws_session_info
toolSpec.description: Get information about the current AWS session.

environment_token.description: Environment token from check_environment_variables() to ensure environment is properly configured

toolSpec.name: get_aws_account_info
toolSpec.description: Get information about the current AWS account being used.
